{{Quote|The Sepan peoples have been torn apart by civil war for generations. Each of the rival factions (the Ripoblus and the Dimoks) is guilty of committing atrocities against the other.|[[Imperial briefing officer]]|<ref name="TF" />}}
The '''Sepan Civil War''', also known as the '''Sepan wars''',<ref name="Sacrifice" /> was a conflict between the [[Dimok (people)|Dimoks]] and the [[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]] of the [[Sepan system/Legends|Sepan system]] which lasted intermittently for [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]].

==History==
{{Quote|Chief of State, even the Empire never managed to stop the Sepan wars, and it was prepared to take far more extreme measures than we are. We should resist any pressure to get involved.|[[Cha Niathal]], to [[Cal Omas]]|<ref name="Sacrifice" />}}
It is unknown exactly when the conflict began, but it is known that by [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], it had raged for several [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] and become sufficiently violent to draw the attention of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In an attempt to defuse the war, three different [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] missions were dispatched to negotiate a peace. The final [[Third mission to the Sepan sector|mission]] was staffed by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Empatojayos Brand]], [[Bultar Swan/Legends|Bultar Swan]], and [[Chellemi Chuovvick]]. Unable to mediate the dispute, questions surrounding a potential Sepan secession from the Republic became common.<ref name="HNN" />

The Sepan Civil War raged on through the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and the [[Declaration of a New Order|establishment]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. As [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] Empire set about restoring order to [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] and suppressing the growing [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]], the Sepan conflict was forgotten.

Building on their momentum after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|victory at Hoth]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]] and a small Imperial fleet was [[Sepan campaign|dispatched]] to the [[Sepan system/Legends|Sepan system]] to end the war. The Imperial presence was welcomed by the [[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]], who saw it as an opportunity to achieve victory over their [[Dimok (people)|Dimok]] enemies. Harkov, however, was determined to bring both sides to heel. With the help of young [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], Harkov's forces drove the two sides together. Representatives from both sides met on [[Sepan 8]] to discuss cooperating to repel the Imperial forces. Their efforts, however, were in vain. Harkov's forces defeated the [[Sepan]] forces and their Rebel Alliance allies, and ended the Sepan Civil War.<ref name="TF" />

Late in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], old tensions flared up again all across the galaxy. Once again, the Sepan Civil War began between the Dimoks and the Ripoblus. It was a high priority of [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] [[Cal Omas]] to send in [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] forces to put an end to the conflict as the Empire had done decades earlier.<ref name="Sacrifice" />
